response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song title 'トライアングル・ドリーマー' (Triangle Dreamer) from the on-screen text. 2. Identified the performers as Omaru Polka, Houshou Marine, and Nekomata Okayu through the context of the event (#尾丸ポルカ生誕祭2026). 3. Determined the composer/lyricist to be Motonari Murakawa, the original creator of the song 'Triangle Dreamer' popularized by Niji no Conquistador. 4. Used the web search tool to find the full Japanese lyrics and an English translation. 5. Compiled and formatted all data into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a full-stage musical performance by VTubers Omaru Polka, Houshou Marine, and Nekomata Okayu, singing the song 'Triangle Dreamer' during Omaru Polka's birthday festival in 2026.

scenes.description: The song 'Triangle Dreamer' (トライアングル・ドリーマー) is performed as a full choreographed musical number by Omaru Polka, Houshou Marine, and Nekomata Okayu. The performance continues throughout the video until its conclusion.
scenes.performer_in_video: Omaru Polka, Houshou Marine, Nekomata Okayu
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Day by day 日に日に募るの 乙女心
おんなじクラス 斜め前のおとなしい人
カッコ良くはない だけど優しい
いつも頼れる 彼

After school 恋愛相談の帰り道
なんだって話せる 親友の女の子
スポーツ万能 勉強もできて
女子力MAXです

どこにでもある よくあること
急に彼女が「あのね、実は私 好きな人がいるの…！」って
ちょ、マジで！？

三角形 三角形の恋はきまぐれ
一瞬で 一瞬でくずれるバランス
ベタなマンガみたいなフラグ
まさかね 自分が立てちゃうなんて 残念すぎます！

三角形 三角形の恋は不安定
なんちゃって なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
恋と友情 ゆらゆらめいて
なんか青春しちゃいます
わたし 困っちゃいます

完敗です！お似合いすぎるわ 勝てっこない
くやしいけどとか そんなんじゃなくて本心
てゆーか すでに応援モード
むしろ 清々しい

だけど彼女は 不思議な顔
真剣な目で「そうじゃなくて、私 あなたが好き…ゴメン」って
ちょ、マジで！？

三角形 三角形の恋はきまぐれ
一瞬で 一瞬でくずれるバランス
わたし アナタ 彼女とわたし
超絶！複雑！百合展開は 想定外です！

三角形 三角形の恋は不安定
なんちゃって なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
解けないパズル 与え給うた
神よ 恨んじゃいます
わたし 悩んじゃいます

「あーっ！もう！スゴいヤバい！」
「好きだよ？好きだけど…って、そういう意味じゃなくって！」
「だって…女の子同士だし…」
「ねえ 神様、どうしたらいいの？」
「わたし、どうしたいの？」
「ヘルプミ〜〜〜！！！」

なんか変だー
愛に国境も 歳も 性別も カンケーない！
けど、けど、けど！

三角形 三角形の恋はきまぐれ
一瞬で 一瞬でくずれるバランス
普通の恋 夢みてたのに
ノーマル設定のわたしじゃ ちょっと無理ゲーすぎます！

三角形 三角形の恋は不安定
なんちゃって なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
彼女のこと 好きになれたら
なんて妄想しちゃいます
…わたし どうかしちゃってます
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Day by day, my maiden heart grows
The quiet person in the same class, sitting diagonally in front of me
Not cool, but kind
The one I can always rely on

After school, on the way back from romantic advice
The best friend girl I can tell anything to
Good at sports, good at studying
Max femininity

It happens everywhere, it's a common occurrence
Suddenly she says, "You know, actually, I have someone I like...!"
Wait, seriously!?

Triangle, triangle, love is fickle
The balance crumbles in an instant, in an instant
A trope like in a cheesy manga
No way, I'm the one who set it up? That's too disappointing!

Triangle, triangle, love is unstable
It's a category that can't be resolved with "just kidding, just kidding"
Love and friendship swaying, swaying
I'm having a youthful moment
I'm troubled

I'm completely defeated! They're too perfect for each other, I can't win
It's not that I'm jealous or anything, it's my true feelings
Actually, I'm already in support mode
If anything, it's refreshing

But she has a strange look on her face
With serious eyes, she says, "That's not it, I like you... sorry"
Wait, seriously!?

Triangle, triangle, love is fickle
The balance crumbles in an instant, in an instant
Me, you, her, and me
Extremely! Complex! A Yuri development is unexpected!

Triangle, triangle, love is unstable
It's a category that can't be resolved with "just kidding, just kidding"
An unsolvable puzzle given to me
God, I hate you
I'm suffering

"Aah! Already! This is crazy, bad!"
"I like you? I like you but... wait, I didn't mean it in that way!"
"Because... we're both girls..."
"Hey God, what should I do?"
"What do I want to do?"
"Help me~~~!!!"

Something is weird
Love has no borders, age, or gender!
But, but, but!

Triangle, triangle, love is fickle
The balance crumbles in an instant, in an instant
I was dreaming of a normal love
With my normal settings, it's a bit too much of a impossible game!

Triangle, triangle, love is unstable
It's a category that can't be resolved with "just kidding, just kidding"
If I could come to like her
I'm fantasizing about that
...I've gone crazy
